name: GolfNXT
about: GolfNXT is a state-of-the-art golf performance center in Fargo, ND, designed for golfers of all skill levels. The facility features 8 simulators, a Virtual Green, and both indoor and outdoor short game areas to provide year-round practice and improvement opportunities. It also includes a full performance gym with TPI Certified trainers, an expert club fitter with over 4,000 fittings, and experienced college coaches. Memberships offer access to the gym, locker rooms, and infrared saunas, with non-members able to book simulator time hourly.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round practice with premium indoor/outdoor facilities
Comprehensive tech including 8 simulators and a Virtual Green
Expert staff with TPI certification and high-level coaching experience
Full performance gym for physical conditioning and injury prevention
Professional club fitting with 4,000+ fittings for optimal equipment

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand and model not specified on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility has professional club fitters and may offer club rentals, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for best results.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so bringing your own may be permitted but it's recommended to check with the facility first.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 8 simulators available, time to play 18 holes depends on availability and booking, but simulator sessions typically run hourly.

faq.question: Is GolfNXT kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they offer junior memberships for golfers 24 and under, indicating a focus on youth development and family-friendly programming.
